case_title: TORRANCE SEALES VS. Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,782.92 FILED BY SEALES, TORRANCE AS TO DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEALES, TORRANCE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEALES, TORRANCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-01-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED ON DEFENDANT *(AGENT FOR SERVICE: HSING-JUNG LEE)* AS TO DEFENDANT Y & L AUTO CORPORATION DBA GENERAL AUTO SERVICE
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
